name: Animation
desc: Player swings their arm (left click or server-side swing).
notes: When server receives this, it broadcasts S0BPacketAnimation to nearby players.

implementation.overview: Sent when the player swings arm. No payload. Modules: NoSwing (cancel to hide arm swing), AntiAnimation (cancel to prevent visual swing).

modules.name: NoSwing
modules.purpose: Cancel C0A to hide arm swing animation.
